paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65, with an 8.66 percent increase from the prior close and a 25.86 percent decrease over a 21-session window. The price data is as of July 21, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a recent headline from TradingView announcing Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date. The company will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026. Additionally, there is one new social post in the last 24 hours, mentioning the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.

Fermi Inc. has 25 total filings in the feed, including one Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031.
